name: Sprint Kickoff
_comment: Track H migration: was Schedule -> 3 GH fetches -> prompt builder -> GPT-4o -> formatter -> 2 Slack posts (8 nodes, hardcoded model, bespoke formatting). Now: Schedule -> Brain (persona_pin=strategy, slack_channel_id=#sprints) -> announcement to #all-paperwork-labs. Brain pulls context via its own memory/tools (docs hub, GitHub), runs via the strategy persona's routing policy (Sonnet for planning), stamps an episode URI, and posts directly to #sprints. Only the short #all-paperwork-labs announcement stays as a separate Slack call because Brain posts to one channel per invocation.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ organization_id: 'paperwork-labs', message: 'It\'s Monday. Generate a 5-day sprint kickoff for Paperwork Labs using the docs hub (TASKS.md, KNOWLEDGE.md, VENTURE_MASTER_PLAN.md) and recent commits. Return Slack-ready markdown with sections: Sprint Goals, Engineering Plan, Risk Assessment, Strategic Priority, Top 3 Priorities. Keep it concise and actionable.', user_id: 'n8n-sprint-kickoff', channel: 'n8n', request_id: ('sprint-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)), persona_pin: 'strategy', slack_channel_id: 'C0AM3APFP99', slack_username: 'Sprint Planning', slack_icon_emoji: ':rocket:' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: 'C0AMEQV199P', text: ':rocket: New 5-day sprint kickoff just landed in <#C0AM3APFP99|sprints>. Reply in-thread with a persona name for a focused take.', username: 'Sprint Planning', icon_emoji: ':rocket:' }) }}
